name: tender-roadshow-voiceover
description: Generate professional Chinese roadshow and tender-demo narration audio from Excel or plain-text scripts.

interface.shortDescription: Generate expert-ready bid demo narration audio
interface.longDescription: A focused voiceover plugin for tender demos, bid defense videos, client walkthroughs, and project capability roadshows. It turns Excel-based narration sheets or plain-text scripts into polished Chinese MP3 output with stable delivery, clear diction, and presentation-friendly pauses.
defaultPrompt: Generate a clear professional bid roadshow voiceover from this Excel narration sheet.
Turn this Chinese narration text into one MP3 with formal tender-demo pacing.
Create a standard male presenter voiceover for this project walkthrough script.
